Work With Us

What We Offer

Our Services

From concept to shipping — we've got every skill your project needs. Work with us for a specific phase or the whole pipeline.

Development

Indie Game Development

We handle every stage of game development — from initial concept and game design to programming, art, audio, and QA. We ship polished, fun experiences.

  • Concept Design
  • Gameplay Programming
  • Multiplayer Systems
  • QA & Optimization
Start a Project

Unity / Unreal Development

Expert Unity and Unreal Engine developers delivering optimized, scalable game builds for any platform.

  • Unity 6
  • Unreal Engine 5
  • Cross-platform builds
  • Performance profiling
Start a Project

Contract Development

Need extra firepower? We embed skilled engineers, artists, and designers into your team on a contract basis.

  • Dedicated Engineers
  • Remote Team Integration
  • Flexible Hours
  • NDA Protected
Start a Project

Consulting

Game Design Consulting

Our experienced game designers review your project and provide actionable feedback on game feel, balance, progression, and player retention.

  • Game Feel Analysis
  • Balance Reviews
  • Monetization Strategy
  • UX Flow
Start a Project

Art

3D Modeling

From low-poly stylized characters to hyper-realistic environments, our 3D team delivers assets optimized for your target platform.

  • Characters & Props
  • Environment Art
  • Rigging & Skinning
  • LOD Setup
Start a Project

Game Art & Animation

Concept art, sprites, UI design, and character animation — we create cohesive visual identities that bring your game world to life.

  • Concept Art
  • 2D Sprites
  • UI/UX Design
  • Character Animation
Start a Project

Audio

Sound Design / Music

Original soundtracks, SFX, dynamic audio systems — our sound team crafts audio experiences that make your world feel alive.

  • Original OST
  • SFX Library
  • Adaptive Audio
  • Voice Direction
Start a Project

Publishing

Publishing Support

From store page optimization to trailer production, we help indie devs navigate publishing on Steam, mobile, and console.

  • Store Page Setup
  • Trailer Production
  • Marketing Strategy
  • Launch Support
Start a Project

Video

Game Trailers / Cinematics

We produce gameplay trailers, story cinematic trailers, and announcement teasers that capture the essence of your game.

  • Gameplay Capture
  • Cinematic Editing
  • Motion Graphics
  • Color Grading
Start a Project

Video Editing

From raw footage to polished social clips, reels, and YouTube content — we handle it all.

  • Devlog Editing
  • Social Reels
  • Gameplay Highlights
  • Subtitle & Captions
Start a Project

Assets

Asset Store Content

We create and publish premium asset packs for Unity and Unreal marketplaces — models, shaders, templates, and tools.

  • Unity Assets
  • Unreal Fab
  • Shader Packs
  • Environment Kits
Start a Project

Web

Web Development

We build immersive game studio websites, game landing pages, and fan portals using modern web tech.

  • Next.js / React
  • 3D Web Experiences
  • CMS Integration
  • SEO Optimization
Start a Project

Not Sure Where to Start?

Tell us about your project and we'll suggest the best approach.
